underlying_goal: Diagnose and fix a PHP deprecation warning appearing in JavaScript files served from Livewire/Flux on a Laravel project
friction_detail: Assistant repeatedly insisted the issue was from a different worktree/old process even after user corrected this, and applied code edits that didn't resolve the symptom the user was seeing
brief_summary: User wanted help diagnosing why a PHP deprecation warning was appearing in JS files despite using PHP 8.4, but the assistant kept misattributing the cause despite multiple corrections.
